sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Search, User, LogIn, LogOut } from 'lucide-react'; const QuestBoard = () => { // Mock data for the quest feed const [quests] = useState([ { id: 1, author: "Geralt_of_Rivia", title: "Griffin Menace at White Orchard", reward: "500 Gold", difficulty: "Medium" }, { id: 2, author: "Link_HY", title: "Collect 500 Rupees for Shield Repair", reward: "Hylian Shield", difficulty: "Easy" }, { id: 3, author: "Cloud_S", title: "Mako Reactor Maintenance", reward: "2000 Gil", difficulty: "Hard" }, ]); return (
{/* --- HEADER SECTION --- */}
{/* Left Top: Profile Info */}
Adventurer_01
{/* Center Top: Label */}

Quest Board

{/* Right Top: Auth Buttons */}
{/* --- MAIN CONTENT AREA --- */}
{/* Search Bar Section */}
{/* Quest Feed */}
{quests.map((quest) => (
{quest.difficulty} {quest.reward}

{quest.title}

Posted by {quest.author}

))}
); }; export default QuestBoard;
